calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The OSC is ordered off calendar/Dismissal on file. Proceedings reported by: LaVon Granger. (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd
Off Calendar Nov-13-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Gena Eales.
Appearances:
Lawrence Einhorn, Esq. for Petitioner: Felicia Manuel present as guardian ad litem for Jasmine Bender, a minor Claimant, also present, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Compromise: $11,000.00
Medical expenses of $2,328.00
Attorney's fees: $4,071.62
The Balance of the settlement proceeds of $4,600.38 shall be disbursed to the Petitioner, Felicia Manuel to be held in trust for the benefit of the Minor.
Order signed in court.
